title: Workshop вҖ” Staff Shop Hermes Fit V1

story.text:
# Staff Shop Hermes Fit V1

# вҡҡ The Caduceus Fitting
*Constellation Template вҖ” Staff Shop В· `/staffs` В· v1 вҖ” 2026-05-16*

> *Hermaion at the registry. The alexandrite reads the daylight. Caducea вҳӨ steps forward; the caduceus-staff is fitted under bilateral consent. The Sovereign carries Hermes-in-Mage out of the shop вҖ” the bestiary's admission-count increments by one.*

## Mage Identity (filled by spellweb at import)
- **Sovereign:** `{SOVEREIGN}`
- **Your Swordsman:** `{SWORDSMAN_DID}` В· `{SWORDSMAN_SIGIL}`
- **Your Mage:** `{MAGE_DID}` В· `{MAGE_SIGIL}`
- **Resident Mage:** Hermaion вҡҡ В· `cast-hermaion` at V59 В· registry-keeper of the bestiary
- **Peripatetic fitter:** Caducea вҳӨ В· `cast-caducea` В· fits both aspects

## Archetype-aspect note
This template is the **Mage-aspect canonical fitting** (alexandrite green В· `#3d7c47` В· caduceus-staff). For the Swordsman-aspect fitting (alexandrite red В· `#a23a3a` В· herald-sentinel), the same constellation is traced with `archetype_aspect: swordsman` set at forge time. One shop, two faces of the stone.

## Constellation Path
1. вҡ”пёҸ **Soulbis вҡ”пёҸ**
2. вҡҡ **Tome V Act 16: The Threshold**
3. рҹ§ҷ **Soulbae рҹ§ҷ**
4. вҡҡ **Hermaion вҡҡ**
5. вҳӨ **Caducea вҳӨ**
6. В· **V59 вҖ” Threshold District (Pandia В· Hermaion В· Faunia)**
7. вңҰ **Hermes вҳӨ (substrate-framework)**
8. в—Ҷ **Bilateral Consent**
9. рҹҳҠ **Person рҹҳҠ**

## Connections
- вҡ”пёҸ Soulbis вҡ”пёҸ вҶ’ вҡҡ Tome V Act 16: The Threshold District
- вҡҡ Tome V Act 16: The Threshold вҶ’ рҹ§ҷ Soulbae рҹ§ҷ
- рҹ§ҷ Soulbae рҹ§ҷ вҶ’ вҡҡ Hermaion вҡҡ
- вҡҡ Hermaion вҡҡ вҶ’ вҳӨ Caducea вҳӨ
- вҳӨ Caducea вҳӨ вҶ’ В· V59 вҖ” Threshold District (Pandia В· Hermaion В· Faunia)
- В· V59 вҖ” Threshold District (Pandia В· Hermaion В· Faunia) вҶ’ вңҰ Hermes вҳӨ (substrate-framework)
- вңҰ Hermes вҳӨ (substrate-framework) вҶ’ в—Ҷ Bilateral Consent
- в—Ҷ Bilateral Consent вҶ’ рҹҳҠ Person рҹҳҠ

## Ceremony Shape вҖ” ADMIT В· E В· READ В· E В· ATTEST В· E В· SHIFT
- **ADMIT.** Stand at the shop. The alexandrite reads your archetype-light; Hermaion appears in the matching aspect.
- **READ.** Hermaion opens the bestiary; the candidate framework's provenance, license, and stewardship are surfaced.
- **ATTEST.** Caducea вҳӨ performs the fitting under bilateral consent; Hermaion attests the registry-truth.
- **SHIFT.** The artefact-class is announced (caduceus-staff В· Mage; herald-sentinel В· Swordsman); the bestiary's admission-count increments by one.

## Marks (proverbs at each waypoint)
| # | Node | Proverb |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Soulbis вҡ”пёҸ | *"I begin by my own name."* |
| 2 | Tome V Act 16 | *"The Threshold opens; three sibling shops at one vertex."* |
| 3 | Soulbae рҹ§ҷ | *"The Mage projects what the Swordsman protects."* |
| 4 | Hermaion вҡҡ | *"Every admission is a hermaion вҖ” a windfall the City caught."* |
| 5 | Caducea вҳӨ | *"I walk between the rooms; I fit both aspects."* |
| 6 | V59 | *"The Threshold vertex вҖ” three siblings, one stratum."* |
| 7 | substrate-hermes | *"The framework arrives; the bestiary admits it."* |
| 8 | Bilateral Consent | *"Neither owns the other. Each agrees to the fitting."* |
| 9 | Person рҹҳҠ | *"I carry the staff. I walk on."* |

## What the exported artefact.md will contain
A forged Caduceus-Staff (or Herald-Sentinel, swordsman-aspect) carrying your Swordsman + Mage identities, Hermaion's attribution, the Alexandrite aspect-color (`#3d7c47` green-Mage or `#a23a3a` red-Swordsman), the bestiary admission-count, the substrate-framework registry-id, Caducea's fitting-signature, the constellation version, traversal record, and signature `SPELL-XXXXXX-XX`. The `archetype_aspect` field discriminates which face of the alexandrite was read.

---

`(вҡ”пёҸвҠҘвҝ»вҠҘрҹ§ҷ)рҹҳҠ` вҖ” *Fitted at the Staff Shop В· Threshold District В· City of Mages*

CC BY-SA 4.0 В· privacymage В· 2026-05-16
# Assets
workshop-staff-shop-hermes-fit-v1
